metadata.title: ACME Health Patient Intake API - HIPAA Compliance Component

components.title: Patient Intake API
components.description: HIPAA-compliant patient intake API with automated policy enforcement, KMS encryption, VPC isolation, least-privilege IAM, CloudTrail audit logging, and cryptographic evidence chains.
components.purpose: Provides secure PHI collection and storage with encryption, access controls, and audit logging

control-implementations.description: HIPAA Security Rule (45 CFR Part 164) implementation for the Patient Intake API. Controls mapped to the Security Standards Matrix published by HHS Office for Civil Rights.

implemented-requirements.description: Encryption and Decryption — implement a mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI (addressable).

statements.description: AWS KMS Customer-Managed Key (CMK) aws_kms_key.phi encrypts all PHI at rest in S3 (aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration.uploads) and DynamoDB (aws_dynamodb_table.intake_compliant, server_side_encryption.kms_key_arn). Auto-rotation enabled. Rego policies gap01 and gap02 enforce CMK encryption at CI/CD time via conftest.

implemented-requirements.description: Transmission Security — implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic communications networks.

statements.description: S3 bucket policy aws_s3_bucket_policy.uploads_tls_only denies all requests where aws:SecureTransport is false (GAP-03). Lambda aws_lambda_function.intake_vpc deploys in aws_subnet.private subnets with aws_security_group.lambda restricting egress (GAP-05). Rego policies gap03 and gap05 enforce these controls at plan time.

implemented-requirements.description: Contingency Plan — establish and implement procedures to restore any loss of data (data backup plan).

statements.description: S3 versioning aws_s3_bucket_versioning.uploads enabled on the PHI uploads bucket (GAP-04). DynamoDB PITR aws_dynamodb_table.intake_compliant.point_in_time_recovery enabled. Rego policy gap04 enforces versioning at plan time.

implemented-requirements.description: Access Control — implement technical policies and procedures to allow access only to authorized persons or programs.

statements.description: IAM role policy aws_iam_role_policy.lambda_least_privilege restricts Lambda to specific actions (dynamodb:PutItem, GetItem, Query; s3:PutObject, GetObject) on named resources only, replacing the wildcard policy (GAP-07). Rego policy gap07 enforces no-wildcard IAM at plan time.

implemented-requirements.description: Audit Controls — implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems containing ePHI.

statements.description: CloudTrail trail aws_cloudtrail.main: multi-region, log-file-validation enabled, data events for S3 object operations on uploads bucket and DynamoDB table operations. Logs KMS-encrypted and stored in dedicated bucket. Evidence vault aws_s3_bucket.evidence_vault uses COMPLIANCE Object Lock (90-day retention) for CI/CD-signed artifacts. AWS Config rules in aws_config_config_rule.* and drift-detection Lambda aws_lambda_function.drift_detector provide continuous monitoring.

implemented-requirements.description: System Monitoring — the entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives (SOC 2 CC7.2); and detects security events (CMMC SI.L2-3.14.6).

statements.description: GAP-06 remediated via aws_lambda_function.drift_detector (terraform/monitoring.tf). The function carries DataClass=phi tag and is hardened with: (1) aws_sqs_queue.drift_detector_dlq — KMS-encrypted SQS dead-letter queue capturing failed invocations; (2) reserved_concurrent_executions=5 preventing resource exhaustion. Rego policy gap06_lambda_dlq_concurrency enforces both controls at CI/CD plan time via conftest, ensuring any new PHI-tagged Lambda added to the workload also carries a DLQ and concurrency limit. EventBridge rule aws_cloudwatch_event_rule.daily_drift_check triggers the Lambda daily; NON_COMPLIANT Config state changes route to aws_sns_topic.compliance_alerts via aws_cloudwatch_event_rule.config_compliance_change.

implemented-requirements.description: Information System Activity Review — implement procedures to regularly review records of information system activity (audit logs, access reports, security incident tracking).

statements.description: Every push to main triggers GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/hipaa-compliance-gate.yml): Terraform plan, conftest policy check, apply, Cosign keyless sign, upload to evidence vault. Daily schedule (cron 0 2 * * *) collects evidence independently of code changes. Drift-detection Lambda runs daily via EventBridge aws_cloudwatch_event_rule.daily_drift_check, queries AWS Config rules, and publishes violations to SNS aws_sns_topic.compliance_alerts.
